The Product Group required to create FinOps BOM Route Headers within the Project Creation

text_4.description: The Company selected for the Quotation / Calculation

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

parameters.request/url: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Dataverse Instance (hso_EnvVarDataverseInstance)')}/api/data/v9.2/hso_projectproducts?$filter=_hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()?['text_5']} and hso_isbillofmaterials eq true  and hso_projecttype eq @{triggerBody()?['number']}&$select=hso_name,hso_lineid&$expand=hso_productid($select=name,productnumber,msdyn_productnumber,msdyn_itemnumber),hso_calculationdetail_billofmaterial_projectproductid_hso_projectproduct($select=hso_name,hso_positionelementtype,hso_itemnumber,hso_quantity,hso_positionquantity;$expand=hso_productionhourid($select=hso_name;$expand=hso_projectcategoryid($select=hso_category,hso_categoryname),hso_operationid($select=hso_name,hso_description;$expand=hso_resourcegroupid($select=hso_name),hso_projectcategoryid($select=hso_category))))

definition.description:
Create the required bill of materials in Unified Operations for all calculation specific project products of type "BOM". The respective products are added to the BOM as BOM lines and for all production hours the respective route operations are created.
This child flow is called up by the parent flow "PA | AUTO | Project Creation | Create FinOps Project for active Calculation when a Quote is won".
